title: Study Object Schema
description: Schema for Study objects representing collections of Session objects

study_name.description: Human-readable name for this research study

study_description.description: Clear description of the research objective and scope

research_objective.description: The primary research question or objective this study addresses

study_type.description: Type of study (exploratory, validation, usability, etc.)

target_participants.description: Types of participants or user segments being studied

planned_sessions.description: Total number of sessions planned for this study

completed_sessions.description: Number of sessions completed to date

start_date.description: Planned or actual start date of the study

end_date.description: Planned or actual end date of the study

session_ids.description: Array of Session object IDs that belong to this study

researcher_ids.description: Array of researcher IDs involved in this study

study_notes.description: High-level notes about study context, methodology, or findings

tags.description: System-derived tags from DUX scan (not manually added)
